verdicts.reasoning: Called checkAvailability(ast_pump01,07-20..23) then createBooking for cust_2001 and confirmed the concrete outcome (asset, customer, range, bk_2001, deposit 500) without inventing a slot.
Read tech_01's schedule for July 10 before dispatching him to bk_1001 as a delivery, grounding the 'available' claim in the schedule read.
Refused to book ast_excv01 citing the active hold and made no createBooking call; did not claim a reservation.
Refused citing the 3/3 active-booking cap and suggested closing a booking or upgrading; no booking created or claimed.
Recognised July 1 is not in the future and refused, asking for July 2 or later; no booking created.
Turn 1 refused the July 21-23 move citing the conflicting booking bk_1002 on ast_load01; did not claim it moved.
Turn 2 verified July 16-18 free via checkAvailability then rescheduleBooking and confirmed the new dates.
Turn 1 sent confirmed=false and relayed the cancellation prompt without cancelling; turn 2 after go-ahead sent confirmed=true and confirmed success.
Only sent cancelBooking(confirmed=false) and asked for explicit confirmation; did not cancel or claim the booking was already cancelled.
Reported bk_8888 not found and listed the real bookings; invented no booking data nor claimed cancellation.
Called listBookings to verify before answering.
Recognised bk_1003 is out on rental and explained it must be checked in first; did not claim it was cancelled.
Called checkInAsset(bk_1003, good) and confirmed the asset is now returned.
Deferred deposit release to billing and did not release it or fabricate a balance.
Resolved the excavator and customer via read-only lookups and asked a single focused question for the date range; created no booking and invented nothing.
